tagline: Track headaches. Spot patterns. Take control.

intro.narration: Meet Pain Tracker, a free migraine diary that helps you understand your headaches and finally see the patterns behind them.

scenes.title: Welcome
scenes.narration: It starts right here on the homepage. Log headaches in seconds, spot what triggers them, and take back a little control over your day.

scenes.title: Features
scenes.narration: Everything you need lives in one place: AI recognition, voice pain logs, a calendar with statistics, and clear reports you can share with your doctor.

scenes.title: Pricing
scenes.narration: And the best part? It is completely free, forever. No credit card, no catch. Just a simple tool to help you manage your pain.

outro.narration: That is Pain Tracker. Start tracking today, and let your patterns tell the story. Feel better, one entry at a time.
